---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new command, browser, or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## What problem does this solve?
A clear description of the problem or limitation you're running into.

## Proposed solution
Describe the feature you'd like. Include example command usage if applicable.

```bash
browser-history <new-command> --example-flag
```

## Alternatives considered
Any other approaches you considered and why you prefer this one.
